pgsql=11

Hi

===>  Building package for pgroonga-2.2.5 
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/databases/pgroonga/work/stageusr/local/include/postgresql/server/contrib/pgroonga_check/pgrn-alias.h:No such file or directory

It seems that it has failed due to such reasons.

I have attached the logs taken with pgsql=11 and pgsql=10.
9.5 and 9.6 and 10 were the same failure.
